function.wynntils.wpIsGearLockEnabled.de: [Wynnpelago] Gets if gear lock mode is current enabled
function.wynntils.wpIsGearLockTypeMode.d: [Wynnpelago] Gets if gear types (armor, accessories, weapons) are separate for gear lock
function.wynntils.wpIsGearLockRarityMode: [Wynnpelago] Gets if gear rarities (unique, rare, legendary+) are separate for gear lock
function.wynntils.wpGearLevel.descriptio: [Wynnpelago] Gets max gear level of a certain type and rarity
function.wynntils.wpGearLevel.argument.t: The gear type, must be one of 'gear', 'armor', 'accessories', or 'weapons'
function.wynntils.wpGearLevel.argument.r: The gear rarity, must be one of 'all', 'unique', 'rare', or 'legendary'
